<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='512' height='512' viewBox='0 0 512 512'>
  <rect width='512' height='512' fill='#f7f1e1' />
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id='wood1' x1='0' x2='1' y1='0' y2='1'>
      <stop offset='0' stop-color='#d6a56a' />
      <stop offset='1' stop-color='#9b6b3a' />
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id='wood2' x1='0' x2='1' y1='0' y2='1'>
      <stop offset='0' stop-color='#f0cfa3' />
      <stop offset='1' stop-color='#d39a5a' />
    </linearGradient>
    <filter id='shadow' x='-50%' y='-50%' width='200%' height='200%'>
      <feDropShadow dx='0' dy='6' stdDeviation='8' flood-color='#000' flood-opacity='0.15'/>
    </filter>
  </defs>

  <!-- guitar body (two overlapping ellipses for shape) -->
  <g filter='url(#shadow)'>
    <ellipse cx='300' cy='320' rx='140' ry='160' fill='url(#wood1)' stroke='#6b3f20' stroke-width='6' />
    <ellipse cx='300' cy='220' rx='90' ry='70' fill='url(#wood2)' stroke='#6b3f20' stroke-width='5' />
  </g>

  <!-- sound hole -->
  <circle cx='300' cy='300' r='40' fill='#111' opacity='0.18' />
  <circle cx='300' cy='300' r='44' fill='none' stroke='#3b2312' stroke-width='6' opacity='0.6' />

  <!-- bridge -->
  <rect x='256' y='392' width='96' height='14' rx='4' fill='#322019' />
  <rect x='278' y='406' width='56' height='6' rx='3' fill='#1e1410' />

  <!-- neck (polygon) -->
  <polygon points='170,190 418,70 438,82 190,202' fill='#c99961' stroke='#6b3f20' stroke-width='4' />

  <!-- headstock -->
  <polygon points='418,70 486,44 498,68 428,94' fill='#8b5a36' stroke='#5a3218' stroke-width='4' />

  <!-- tuning pegs (small circles) -->
  <g fill='#ddd'>
    <circle cx='440' cy='62' r='6' fill='#f5f5f5' stroke='#6b6b6b' stroke-width='2' />
    <circle cx='456' cy='70' r='6' fill='#f5f5f5' stroke='#6b6b6b' stroke-width='2' />
    <circle cx='472' cy='60' r='6' fill='#f5f5f5' stroke='#6b6b6b' stroke-width='2' />
  </g>

  <!-- strings from bridge to headstock -->
  <g stroke='#cccccc' stroke-linecap='round'>
    <line x1='268' y1='392' x2='442' y2='66' stroke-width='1.6' />
    <line x1='282' y1='390' x2='454' y2='70' stroke-width='1.4' />
    <line x1='296' y1='388' x2='466' y2='64' stroke-width='1.2' />
    <line x1='308' y1='388' x2='478' y2='70' stroke-width='1.2' />
    <line x1='324' y1='390' x2='490' y2='66' stroke-width='1.0' />
    <line x1='338' y1='392' x2='502' y2='72' stroke-width='0.9' />
  </g>

  <!-- frets (rotated group across neck) -->
  <g transform='rotate(-18 240 160)' stroke='#3d2a20' stroke-width='3'>
    <rect x='160' y='120' width='2.5' height='260' fill='#eee' />
    <rect x='200' y='120' width='2.5' height='260' fill='#eee' />
    <rect x='240' y='120' width='2.5' height='260' fill='#eee' />
    <rect x='280' y='120' width='2.5' height='260' fill='#eee' />
    <rect x='320' y='120' width='2.5' height='260' fill='#eee' />
  </g>

  <!-- nut (top of neck) -->
  <rect x='166' y='174' width='24' height='8' rx='2' fill='#efeae3' transform='rotate(-18 178 178)' />

</svg>
